claims.template: A majority of [GROUP] drink tea at least once a week.
Most [GROUP] prefer window seats when travelling by train.
More than half of [GROUP] keep a plant in their home.
A majority of [GROUP] listen to music while cooking.
Most [GROUP] have visited a public library in the past year.
More than half of [GROUP] check the weather before leaving home.
A majority of [GROUP] prefer breakfast foods that are savoury.
Most [GROUP] carry a reusable shopping bag.
More than half of [GROUP] take a walk for leisure each week.
A majority of [GROUP] read product labels before buying snacks.
Most [GROUP] would choose a quiet café over a busy one.
More than half of [GROUP] make a written weekend to-do list.
A majority of [GROUP] watch a film at home at least monthly.
Most [GROUP] prefer shopping earlier rather than later in the day.
More than half of [GROUP] use maps even on familiar journeys.
A majority of [GROUP] keep leftovers for another meal.
